description: Stores reusable AI prompts with categories, variable templates, usage tracking, and Personal/Shared visibility for team collaboration.

Name.description: Unique prompt name for retrieval (e.g., 'Client Onboarding Email', 'Code Review Checklist')

Content.description: Full prompt text with optional {{variable}} placeholders for interactive substitution

Category.description: Prompt category for filtering and organization. Custom categories can be added.

Variables.description: Comma-separated list of {{variable}} names detected in the prompt content (e.g., 'client_name, project, deadline')

Visibility.description: Access control: Personal (only creator) or Shared (visible to team). Defaults to Personal on creation.

Times Used.description: Usage counter incremented each time the prompt is retrieved via /prompt:get

Author.description: Name of the person who added the prompt

Tags.description: Optional tags for cross-category search and discovery (e.g., 'onboarding', 'weekly', 'client-facing')

Created At.description: Timestamp when the prompt was first added to the library

Last Used.description: Timestamp of the most recent retrieval via /prompt:get

notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /prompt:add. Idempotent upsert by Name property (case-insensitive match). Times Used starts at 0 and increments on each /prompt:get retrieval. Visibility defaults to Personal; changed to Shared via /prompt:share.
